mcitem.title: MC Item Editor
mcitem.astool_tip: Changes will be copied to clipboard
mcitem.unsaved: Unsaved! Click again to discard changes

jmenu.title_hover: Click to edit #%slot% in row %row%, column %column%
jmenu.unsave_text: You haven't saved Button#%slot% [row %row%, column %column%], what do you want to do?
jmenu.permission_have: Only when have the permission [%perm%] will the player see it.
jmenu.permission_miss: Only when miss the permission [%perm%] will the player see it.
jmenu.permission_remove: Click to remove the permission requirement.

msg.permission_revoked: File system permission has been revoked. The workspace has been reset. Use "Open Workspace" to continue editing.
msg.permission_denied_restore: Insufficient permission to restore the previous workspace. Use "Open Workspace" to load it manually.
msg.file_changed_external: File "%target%" has been modified externally. Reload?
